rationale.vacuity: Confirmed. All three original >= 0 conjuncts are structurally impossible to violate on Nat-typed cursor variables. Proposer and reviewer agree. P11 provided zero verification value in its original form.
rationale.soundness: All three replacement conjuncts verified sound by exhaustive action trace. log_bounded mirrors INV9/INV10 patterns and holds across all six cursor-modifying actions plus init. session_consistency holds because OMSViewChange is the only oms_primary writer and it simultaneously clears oms_log. seq_uniqueness holds because oms_seq is a monotonic counter reset atomically with oms_log on view change.
rationale.dispute: None. Reviewer APPROVE at 0.93. No substantive disagreement to adjudicate.
rationale.low_severity_issue: Reviewer notes naming mismatch: OMSCursorConsistency no longer describes the primary content after strengthening. Issue is cosmetic and non-blocking. Renaming deferred to a later step per reviewer recommendation.
rationale.old_conjuncts_retained: The original >= 0 checks are preserved in the proposal. Retaining them is harmless and may aid readability even if vacuous.

accepted_diff.new_formula:
OMSCursorConsistency ==
    \A p \in Partitions :
        /\ \A e \in oms_log[p] : e.seq < oms_seq[p]
        /\ \A e \in oms_log[p] : e.session = oms_primary[p]
        /\ \A e1, e2 \in oms_log[p] : e1.seq = e2.seq => e1 = e2
        /\ oms_ce_cursor[p] >= 0
        /\ \A m \in Markets : oms_ob_cursor[p][m] >= 0
        /\ \A m \in Markets : oms_pending_cursor[p][m] >= 0

deferred_actions.action: rename INV11 from OMSCursorConsistency to OMSStructuralConsistency or OMSLogAndCursorConsistency

verification_coverage_delta: positive. OMS log corruption (wrong seq), cross-session contamination (stale session on log entry), and duplicate-seq bugs now detectable by TLC. OMS log was the least-constrained log in the spec; this closes that gap.
state_space_impact: zero. No new variables or action modifications. TLC cost increase is bounded by oms_log size which is capped by MaxSeq.
